leadText: The Razor Fang (Japanese: するどいキバ Razor Fang) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows Gligar to evolve into Gliscor, and also allows the holder's moves to cause Pokémon to flinch.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.1.3 Moves affected in Generation IV 1.2 Outside battles Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Grants certain moves used by the holder a 10% chance of causing targets to flinch . Each strike of a multistrike move has an independent chance of causing the target to flinch. Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] Grants the moves listed below a 10% chance of causing each target to flinch. This chance is not affected by Serene Grace . In this generation only, due to the way this item's effect is resolved, U-turn will be able to flinch the target only if the Pokémon being switched into is holding the item. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Grants all attacking moves that do not already have a chance to flinch a 10% chance of causing each target to flinch. This chance is affected by Serene Grace and the rainbow created by Fire Pledge and Water Pledge . Razor Fang does not activate Sheer Force , but Sheer Force removes the chance to flinch if the move already has an additional effect . Wrap Normal Physical X-Scissor Bug Physical Outside battles [ edit | edit source ] The Razor Fang causes Gligar to evolve into Gliscor when leveled up at night while holding it. This consumes the Razor Fang. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , the Razor Fang causes Gligar to evolve into Gliscor when used during the night. This consumes the Razor Fang.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Lunar Ribbon and Razor Fang at Luminous Spring , Gligar can be evolved into Gliscor . This consumes the Lunar Ribbon and Razor Fang. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

Mistral (Kecleon Shop: 3F, 5F, 7F, 9F, 11F, 13F, 15F, 17F, 19F), Shimmer Hill (Kecleon Shop: 2F, 4F, 6F, 8F, 10F, 12F, 14F, 16F), Lost Wilderness (Kecleon Shop: B3F, B5F, B7F, B9F, B11F, B13F, B15F, B17F)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS An item to be held by a Pokémon. It may cause the foe to flinch when the holder inflicts damage. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It may make foes and allies flinch when the holder inflicts damage. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder successfully inflicts damage, the target may also flinch. LA A sharp and pointed fang that seems as though it might be able to pierce straight through anything at all. It's loved by a certain Pokémon. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This sharply hooked fang may cause the target to flinch whenever the holder successfully inflicts damage on them with an attack.
